models package¶

Submodules¶

models.task module¶

class models.task.Task(id, title, date, status='in progres')[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents a single task in the to-do list.

Attributes:

id (int): Unique identifier of the task title (str): Task title or description date (date | str): Due date of the task status (str): Current status of the task (default: “in progres”)

is_done()[source]¶

Checks whether the task is completed.

Returns:

True if task status is ‘done’, otherwise False

models.vacation module¶

class models.vacation.Itinerary(id, vacation_id, day, start_time, end_time, activity, location, notest)[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents an activity planned during a vacation day.

class models.vacation.Vacation(id, destination, start_date, end_date)[source]¶

Bases: object

Represents a vacation entity.

Attributes:

id (int): Unique identifier of the vacation destination (str): Vacation destination (country, city) start_date (str | date): Start date of the vacation end_date (str | date): End date of the vacation

Personal Planner
